name: Luminous API
description: Luminous is an inventory tool for ecommerce brands, offering multichannel tracking, wholesale support, integrated EDI, and multi-warehouse stock control. The API provides access to products, purchase orders, sales orders, inventory, companies, contacts, locations, invoices, tags, custom fields, pricing, and BOMs.
